de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.match.vm

Class TacletMatchProgram

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.match.vm.TacletMatchProgram

  • public class TacletMatchProgram
extends java.lang.Object
    Instances of this class represent programs for matching a term against a given pattern. The programs are specialised for a certain pattern. To create such a program use the static method createProgram(Term) and provide as argument the pattern for which you want to get a matcher. The program is executed by invoking match(Term, MatchConditions, Services).

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static TacletMatchProgram EMPTY_PROGRAM
      the skip program (matches anything)

    • Method Detail

      • createProgram

        public static TacletMatchProgram createProgram(Term pattern)
        creates a matcher for the given pattern
        Parameters:
        pattern - the Term specifying the pattern
        Returns:
        the specialized matcher for the given pattern

      • getMatchInstructionForSV

        public static MatchSchemaVariableInstruction<? extends SchemaVariable> getMatchInstructionForSV(SchemaVariable op)
        returns the instruction for the specified variable
        Parameters:
        sv - the SchemaVariable for which to get the instruction
        Returns:
        the instruction for the specified variable

      • match

        public MatchConditions match(Term p_toMatch,
                             MatchConditions p_matchCond,
                             Services services)
        executes the program and tries to match the provided term; additional restrictions are provided via match conditions. The returned conditions are either null if no match is possible or MatchConditions which extends the given conditions by additional constraints (e.g., instantiations of schemavariables) such that they describe the found match
        Parameters:
        p_toMatch - the Term to match
        p_matchCond - the initial MatchConditions which have to be satisfied in addition to those generated by this match
        services - the Services
        Returns:
        null if no match was found or the match result
